Custom AI Agents for Your Business

Premium solutions tailored to your industry and needs

📞

AI Receptionist

24/7 answering that books appointments and protects your brand.

  • Answers calls 24/7 with a warm, professional tone
  • Books & manages appointments (Cal.com ready)
  • Captures caller details + reason for visit
  • Sends SMS/email confirmations & reminders
  • Routes urgent calls to a human immediately
  • Reduces missed calls and lost revenue
Best for: Medical Spas • Dental Offices • Medical Practices

🔍

Research Agent

Fast, organized research that turns into usable insights.

  • Summarizes markets, competitors, and opportunities
  • Builds lead lists and outreach-ready notes
  • Produces client-ready briefs and talking points
  • Tracks trends and updates on request
  • Saves hours of manual digging each week
Best for: Insurance Agencies • Marketing Agencies
Learn more →
📱

Personal Assistant

Your day organized—tasks, follow-ups, and reminders handled.

  • Manages calendar, reminders, and priorities
  • Drafts follow-ups (SMS/email) and keeps threads moving
  • Organizes tasks, notes, and weekly plans
  • Helps your team stay consistent and on time
  • Optional: integrates with Notion / Google Tasks
Best for: Any business owner or team needing structure
